tastingDescription: Like the dragon at the top of the city, Gulden Draak has been one of the world's best beers for years. It is a dark tripel, which in itself makes it an exceptional beer, but the complex taste with notes of caramel, roasted malt and coffee makes it unique. Gulden Draak is easy to drink as an aperitif, dessert or just when you have time to enjoy. This barley wine harmonises perfectly with and in stews. It also gives added value to sauces with red meat such as bordelaise and is also ideal as a dessert beer, especially with dark chocolate.
